entries.original: You can now fork a thread into sub-agents, making it easier to branch work without leaving the current conversation. (#12499)
entries.translated: ~/.ssh 및 기타 일부 디렉터리에 대한 샌드박스 읽기 권한 부여하지 않음

entries.original: Realtime voice sessions now let you pick microphone and speaker devices, persist those choices, and send audio in a format better aligned with transcription. (#12849, #12850, #13030)
entries.translated: 권한 상승 요청 시 샌드박스 설정 포함

entries.original: Custom tools can now return multimodal output, including structured content like images, instead of being limited to plain text. (#12948)
The app server now exposes richer model availability and upgrade metadata, and the TUI uses it to explain plan-gated models with limited-run tooltips. (#12958, #12972, #13021)
entries.translated: Resume/fork 시 cwd 확인을 위해 `thread_id` 사용

entries.original: Memories are now configurable, and there is a new `codex debug clear-memories` command to fully reset saved memory state when needed. (#12997, #12999, #13002, #13085)
entries.translated: 클라이언트가 옵션으로 요약을 보내지 않도록 허용

entries.original: Reconnecting with `thread/resume` now restores pending approval and input requests instead of leaving clients out of sync. (#12560)
`thread/start` no longer blocks unrelated app-server requests, reducing stalls during slow startup paths such as MCP auth checks. (#13033)
Interactive terminal sessions no longer print the final assistant response twice. (#13082)
Large pasted-content placeholders now survive file completion correctly, fixing a regression from `0.106.0`. (#13070)
entries.translated: Turn 환경 컨텍스트에 로컬 날짜 및 시간대 추가

entries.original: ChatGPT accounts that arrive without plan info now handle account reads correctly instead of triggering repeated login issues. (#13072)
Diff rendering in the TUI now respects theme colors better and displays more cleanly in Windows Terminal and other low-color environments. (#13016, #13037)
MCP OAuth login flows now forward configured `oauth_resource` values correctly for servers that require a `resource` parameter. (#12866)
Updated sandbox escalation guidance so dependency-install failures caused by sandboxed network access are more clearly treated as escalation candidates. (#13051)
Tightened sandbox filesystem behavior by improving restricted read-only handling on Linux and avoiding sensitive directories like `~/.ssh` on Windows. (#12369, #12835)
Escalated shell commands now keep their sandbox configuration when rerun, closing a gap where approvals could lose the intended restrictions. (#12839)
entries.translated: MCP 로그인 흐름에 대한 `oauth_resource` 처리 추가

entries.original: #12925 chore: calm down awaiter
#12499 feat: fork thread multi agent
#12837 Log js_repl nested tool responses in rollout history
entries.translated: `js_repl` 중첩 도구 응답을 롤아웃 기록에 로그

entries.original: #12774 feat: add post-compaction sub-agent infos
entries.translated: Compaction 후 서브 에이전트 정보 추가

entries.translated: `~/.ssh` 및 일부 디렉터리에 대한 샌드박스 읽기 권한 부여하지 않음
